title: The “suspense” ended Thursday as major legislation by Senator Dave Cortese advanced out of the Senate Appropriations Committee. The fiscal committee heard its “suspense file” on Ma
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Studies show that religious exercise reduces violence and other negative behaviors in correctional facilities and lowers recidivism.
The proposed legislation aims to protect California communities from hazardous industrial pollution.
The bills will provide tools for educators and school staff to save children from opioid overdoses.
The introduction of a guaranteed income program for homeless students aims to assist them in enrolling in college or entering the workforce.
Prone restraint is often used on students with special needs.
New workplace violence prevention standards are being established to address the types of attacks that have increased in recent years.
Mandatory building standards are expected to reduce the potable water demand of new buildings by 25 percent.
